visual_direction.reference_energy: Apple product launch films (clean, deliberate, detail-focused)
visual_direction.color_bias: Monochrome with #C9A84C gold accent for key measurements
visual_direction.motion_style: Slow push-ins, static holds, no handheld shake

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) on #0D0D0D background
shot_list.framing: Top-down, 90° angle, fill frame with socket
shot_list.must_capture: Crisp edges of socket, matte FKM texture, no glare

shot_list.subject: 0.7mm retaining lip (side profile)
shot_list.action: Static hold, slight tilt to show depth
shot_list.framing: Side view, lip fills 80% of frame
shot_list.must_capture: Shadow cast to emphasize lip thickness

shot_list.subject: 22mm lug width measurement
shot_list.action: Slide caliper into frame to confirm width
shot_list.must_capture: Caliper reading 22.00mm, FKM rubber under jaws

shot_list.subject: All 8 colourways in grid
shot_list.must_capture: Each colourway in identical lighting, #1A1A1A background

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Arctic Blue) on wrist
shot_list.must_capture: No gaps between adapter and wrist, FKM grain visible

shot_list.subject: Crown notches (×2)
shot_list.action: Static hold, slight zoom to show precision
shot_list.must_capture: Crisp notch edges, no tooling marks

edit_plan.edit_instruction: Open on Shot 1 (40.35mm socket). Text overlay: '40.35mm socket'. Hold for 3s.
Cut to Shot 2 (0.7mm lip). Text overlay: '0.7mm retaining lip'. Hold for 2s.
Cut to Shot 3 (22mm lugs). Text overlay: '22mm lug width'. Hold for 2s.
Cut to Shot 4 (8 colourways). Text overlay: '8 colourways. One engineering standard.' Pan left-to-right over 3s.
Cut to Shot 5 (wrist shot). No text. Rotate wrist over 3s.
Cut to Shot 6 (crown notches). Text overlay: 'FKM rubber — durable, premium'. Hold for 2s.
Cut to Shot 1 (reprise). Text overlay: 'Comment WRIST for the waitlist link.' Hold for 1s, then fade to black.
edit_plan.on_screen_text: Comment WRIST for the waitlist link.

asset_requirements: Cradle Adapter V1 in all 8 colourways (must be shot in identical lighting)
Neutral wrist model (skin tone #F0EDE8 or darker to contrast with Arctic Blue)
Macro lens or phone macro attachment (for 0.7mm lip detail)
briefs.cover_frame_direction: Shot 1 (40.35mm socket) with text overlay: '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.' and #C9A84C accent on measurements.
briefs.subtitle_style: White #F0EDE8, Futura Medium, centered, 32pt, 80% opacity black drop shadow
briefs.handoff_for_manual_reel: Shoot all shots in 4K 24fps. Use tripod + remote shutter to eliminate shake. Lighting: 2x softboxes at 45° to avoid hotspots on FKM rubber. Edit in 9:16, export at 1080x1920, 24fps, H.264, no compression artifacts.
